results.title: Stripe
results.description: Stripe is a financial services and software as a service company that provides payment processing software and APIs for e-commerce websites and mobile applications.

results.title: Stripe (llmstxt)
results.description: Stripe is a financial infrastructure platform for businesses that provides payment processing, payouts, and other financial services.

results.title: Stripe Python
results.description: The Stripe Python library provides convenient access to the Stripe API from applications written in Python, supporting dynamic initialization from API responses.

results.title: Stripe.js
results.description: Stripe.js is a lightweight JavaScript library that provides a secure and customizable way to collect payments and sensitive information on your website.

results.title: Strip Tags
results.description: A Python CLI tool and library to strip HTML tags from content, optionally using CSS selectors, with features for minification, content removal, and selective tag preservation.

results.title: Stripe CLI
results.description: The Stripe CLI helps you build, test, and manage your Stripe integration right from the terminal, enabling secure webhook testing, real-time log tailing, and object management.

results.title: Stripe Node
results.description: The Stripe Node library provides convenient access to the Stripe API from applications written in server-side JavaScript.

results.title: Stripe.net
results.description: The official Stripe .NET library provides a comprehensive way to integrate Stripe payments and services into .NET applications, supporting various .NET platforms.

results.title: Stripe PHP
results.description: The Stripe PHP library provides convenient access to the Stripe API from applications written in the PHP language, offering a pre-defined set of classes for API resources.

results.title: Stripity Stripe
results.description: An Elixir library for working with the Stripe API, enabling developers to process payments and manage customer data within Elixir applications.

results.title: Stripe Recommendations
results.description: A guide on how to implement Stripe payments in SaaS applications by syncing all customer data to a KV store to avoid split states and race conditions.

results.title: Stripe Java
results.description: The official Stripe Java client library provides a convenient way for Java developers to integrate Stripe's payment processing capabilities into their applications.

results.title: Svelte Stripe
results.description: Svelte Stripe provides everything needed to integrate Stripe Elements into Svelte and SvelteKit projects for payment processing.

results.title: Stripe Firebase Extensions
results.description: Official Stripe Firebase extensions that enable payment functionality for web, mobile, and subscriptions, created and tested by Stripe for reliability and security.

results.title: Stripe Accept a Payment
results.description: Learn how to securely accept payments online with Stripe, offering examples for Prebuilt Checkout, Payment Element, and Custom payment flows.

results.title: Stripe Clojure
results.description: A Clojure library providing convenient access to the Stripe API, allowing developers to integrate Stripe's payment processing capabilities into their Clojure applications.

results.title: Supabase Stripe Sync Engine
results.description: Synchronizes Stripe account data with a Postgres database, offering a TypeScript library and a Fastify-based server for real-time webhook processing.

results.title: Async Stripe
results.description: Convenient Rust bindings and types for the Stripe HTTP API, aiming to support the entire API surface and updating definitions weekly.

results.title: Stripe Mock
results.description: Stripe Mock is a mock HTTP server that mimics the Stripe API, designed for basic sanity checks in server-side SDK test suites by validating request URLs and parameters.

results.title: Laravel Cashier Stripe
results.description: Laravel Cashier provides an expressive, fluent interface to Stripe's subscription billing services.

results.title: Epic Stack with Stripe
results.description: Intentionally minimal Stripe subscriptions integration with payment links

results.title: Stripe Ruby
results.description: The Stripe Ruby library provides convenient access to the Stripe API from applications written in the Ruby language, offering features like easy configuration, pagination helpers, and parameter serialization.

results.title: Stripe iOS SDK
results.description: The Stripe iOS SDK provides powerful and customizable UI screens and elements, along with low-level APIs, to enable quick and easy integration of payment experiences, Apple Pay, SCA compliance, and identity verification into iOS applications.

results.title: Svelte Stripe
results.description: Svelte Stripe provides components to easily integrate Stripe Elements into your Svelte projects, offering compatibility with SvelteKit and various payment methods.

results.title: Stripe Go
results.description: The official Go client library for interacting with the Stripe API, enabling developers to process payments and manage financial operations within their Go applications.

results.title: Stripe Checkout Single Subscription
results.description: This sample demonstrates how to use Stripe Checkout and Billing to create a subscription payment page without a server, supporting multiple languages and Apple Pay.

results.title: Stripe Checkout One-Time Payments
results.description: This sample demonstrates how to integrate with Stripe Checkout to accept one-time payments, offering features like localization, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and dynamic 3D Secure.

results.title: Stripe Apps
results.description: Stripe Apps allows developers to embed custom user experiences directly within the Stripe Dashboard and orchestrate the Stripe API.

results.title: Launch MVP Stripe Nextjs Supabase
results.description: A production-ready Next.js template with authentication, dark mode, Stripe integration, and a modern UI, built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.

results.title: Stripe Terminal iOS SDK
results.description: The Stripe Terminal iOS SDK allows developers to build custom in-person checkout experiences within their iOS apps, enabling the acceptance of payments via pre-certified card readers and unifying online and offline payment channels.
